description.en: The definitive Jeonju bibimbap restaurant run by Mrs. Kim Nyeon-im, an intangible cultural heritage holder and the No. 1 master chef of Jeonju cuisine. Only two items on the menu — Jeonju bibimbap and yukhoe bibimbap — served in hot brass bowls.
description.ko: 무형문화재 보유자 김년임 명인이 운영하는 정통 전주비빔밥 맛집. 메뉴는 전주비빔밥과 육회비빔밥 두 가지뿐. 놋그릇에 정성스럽게 제공.

address.en: Near Jeonju Hanok Village, Wansan-gu, Jeonju-si

best_times.en: Lunch 11 AM-2 PM, arrive early for short wait

tips: Only two menu items — both are excellent
The brass bowl is traditional Jeonju style
Run by an intangible cultural heritage holder

description.en: Korea's first Jeonju bibimbap restaurant, operating since 1952 and now in its 3rd generation. Featured in Michelin Guide. Their dolsot bibimbap (stone pot) with cooked beef is the classic choice.
description.ko: 1952년부터 3대째 이어온 대한민국 최초의 전주비빔밥 가게. 미슐랭 가이드 등재. 돌솥비빔밥이 대표 메뉴.

best_times.en: Daily 10:30 AM-9 PM, lunch rush 12-1 PM

tips: Korea's first bibimbap restaurant — since 1952
Try the dolsot (stone pot) version for crispy rice
3rd generation family-run — true heritage

description.en: Jeonju's famous makgeolli town where a single order of rice wine comes with a table overflowing with side dishes — from seafood pancakes to spicy stir-fried pork. Order more makgeolli and more dishes keep coming.
description.ko: 막걸리 한 주전자를 시키면 상다리가 휘어지도록 안주가 나오는 전주 막걸리 문화의 성지. 해물전, 제육볶음 등 추가 주문마다 새로운 안주 등장.

tips: Each makgeolli order brings a new wave of side dishes
Makgeolli is served in a kettle, shared by 3-4 people
This is uniquely Jeonju food culture — don't miss it

description.en: The most beloved makgeolli restaurant in Jeonju's makgeolli town. Generous table settings with jokbal, crispy jeon, samgyetang, and kimchi jjim that pair perfectly with their house makgeolli. Always a long queue.
description.ko: 전주 막걸리촌에서 가장 사랑받는 막걸리집. 족발, 바삭한 전, 삼계탕, 김치찜이 푸짐하게 나오는 상차림. 항상 긴 줄이 특징.

best_times.en: Arrive early evening 5:30 PM to beat the queue

tips: Always a long queue — arrive early
Side dishes include jokbal, jeon, samgyetang, and kimchi jjim
Share with a group of 3-4 for the full experience

description.en: A legendary Hanok Village institution since 1977, famous for one dish: creamy, savory kalguksu topped with perilla seeds and chili powder. The thick, hearty broth has captivated taste buds for nearly 50 years.
description.ko: 1977년부터 한옥마을에서 칼국수 하나로 승부한 전설의 맛집. 들깨와 고춧가루를 올린 걸쭉하고 고소한 칼국수. 약 50년간 사랑받는 맛.

tips: Only one dish on the menu — kalguksu
The perilla seed topping is the secret
Since 1977 — nearly 50 years of one perfect dish

description.en: A riverside dining village with three sister restaurants — Namyang-jip, Hwasun-jip, and Hanbyeok-jip — all equally excellent. Sit on outdoor platforms (pyeongsang) by the Jeonju Stream and enjoy Korean cuisine with makgeolli.
description.ko: 전주천변에 남양집, 화순집, 한벽집 세 자매 식당이 모인 강변 맛집 마을. 천변 평상에서 막걸리와 한식을 즐기는 풍류의 공간.

address.en: Omokari Village, by Jeonju Stream, Wansan-gu, Jeonju-si

best_times.en: Spring/Fall evenings for outdoor seating by the stream

tips: All three restaurants are similar — pick whichever has shorter wait
Sit on the outdoor platforms by the stream
Order makgeolli with the river view

description.en: Located in Jeonju Nambu Market, this institution is famous for sundaegukbap (blood sausage rice soup) and pisundae eaten with perilla leaves. A hearty, no-frills local market experience.
description.ko: 전주 남부시장의 터줏대감. 순대국밥과 피순대를 들깻잎에 싸 먹는 것이 특징. 푸짐하고 소박한 시장 맛집 경험.

tips: Wrap the pisundae in perilla leaves for full flavor
Located in Nambu Market — explore after eating
Hearty and affordable

description.en: Korea's first museum dedicated to hanji (traditional Korean paper), housing 3,000 artifacts. Free hands-on workshops let you make your own hanji paper in about 10 minutes. Closed Mondays.
description.ko: 한국 최초의 한지 전문 박물관. 3,000점의 유물 소장. 약 10분 소요의 무료 한지 만들기 체험. 월요일 휴관.

tips: Free hanji-making workshop — takes about 10 minutes
3,000 artifacts about traditional Korean paper
First paper museum in Korea

description.en: A center dedicated to Korea's traditional fan-making heritage. Fans here are intricate art made with bamboo frames and hanji surfaces. Free admission with optional fan-making workshops.
description.ko: 한국 전통 부채 문화를 보존하는 전문 센터. 대나무 프레임과 한지로 만든 정교한 부채 예술. 무료 입장, 부채 만들기 체험 가능.

tips: Free admission
Fan-making classes available — create your own
Fans are art pieces, not just cooling tools

description.en: A hands-on hanji craft workshop in Hanok Village where you can make mirrors, dolls, bracelets, and LED chorong lanterns using traditional Korean paper. Most popular: hanji doll and LED lantern classes from 10,000 won.
description.ko: 한옥마을의 한지 공예 체험 공방. 거울, 인형, 팔찌, LED 초롱 등을 한지로 만들 수 있음. 가장 인기: 한지인형과 LED 초롱 체험 1만원부터.

address.en: Craft Masterpiece Street, Jeonju Hanok Village

tips: LED chorong lantern class is most popular (10,000 won)
Make your own hanji doll as a unique souvenir
Located on Craft Masterpiece Street

description.en: A Hanok Village favorite for sweet and savory marinated stone-grilled galbi. The beef is grilled on hot stones at your table, creating a caramelized crust that Jeonju locals crave.
description.ko: 한옥마을에서 달콤하고 풍미 깊은 양념 석갈비로 사랑받는 맛집. 뜨거운 돌 위에서 구워 캐러멜 크러스트가 형성되는 것이 특징.

tips: Stone-grilled galbi creates an amazing crust
Sweet marinade is the Jeonju style
Pair with soju or makgeolli

description.en: A hilltop village where 40+ houses are adorned with colorful murals and art installations. A hidden gem above the Hanok Village offering panoramic views of the traditional rooftops below — far fewer tourists than the main village.
description.ko: 40채 이상의 집에 컬러풀한 벽화가 그려진 언덕 마을. 한옥마을 위에서 전통 지붕의 파노라마 뷰를 제공하는 숨은 명소. 관광객이 훨씬 적음.

best_times.en: Morning or late afternoon for soft light
best_times.ko: 아침 또는 늦은 오후 부드러운 빛

tips: Panoramic views of Hanok Village rooftops from above
Much less crowded than the main village below
Residents live here — keep noise down

description.en: One of Korea's three major traditional markets, buzzing with street food stalls selling kongnamulgukbap (bean sprout soup), dumplings, steamed buns, and fried chicken at local prices. The night market is especially vibrant.
description.ko: 한국 3대 전통시장 중 하나. 콩나물국밥, 만두, 찐빵, 치킨 등 저렴한 시장 먹거리가 가득. 특히 야시장이 활기 넘침.

tips: Friday and Saturday night market is a must
Try the kongnamulgukbap (bean sprout soup)
One of Korea's three great traditional markets

description.en: A generous Korean set meal (hanjeongsik) restaurant near Hanok Village serving 16+ side dishes including tteokgalbi, soy crab, and spicy marinated crab. The full table spread is a feast for the eyes and stomach.
description.ko: 한옥마을 인근의 풍성한 한정식 전문점. 16가지 이상 반찬에 떡갈비, 간장게장, 양념게장 포함. 상다리가 휘는 한 상 차림.

address.en: Near Jeonju Hanok Village, Wansan-gu, Jeonju-si

tips: 16+ side dishes — don't fill up on rice too quickly
Includes both soy crab and spicy crab
Great value for the massive spread

description.en: A serene park with one of Korea's most beautiful lotus ponds. In summer (July-August), the entire pond blooms with pink and white lotus flowers. A pedestrian bridge crosses the pond for stunning photo opportunities.
description.ko: 한국에서 가장 아름다운 연꽃 연못 중 하나가 있는 고요한 공원. 여름(7-8월) 분홍과 흰색 연꽃이 만개. 연못 위 보행교에서 멋진 사진 촬영 가능.

best_times.en: July-August for lotus bloom, morning for photography

tips: Visit July-August for full lotus bloom
Walk across the pedestrian bridge through the lotus
Early morning has the best light and fewest visitors

description.en: A 30-year-old Hanok Village tradition specializing in mulgalbi (water galbi) — a unique Jeonju-style beef rib hot pot in a sweet and spicy broth. The galbi jeongol is shared at the table, bubbling away.
description.ko: 30년 전통의 한옥마을 물갈비 전문점. 달콤하고 매콤한 국물에 소갈비를 넣고 끓이는 전주식 갈비전골. 보글보글 끓는 전골을 함께 나누는 맛.

best_times.en: Dinner 5-9 PM, especially in cold months

tips: Mulgalbi is unique to Jeonju — must-try
Best shared between 2-3 people
Perfect comfort food in winter

description.en: A Hanok Village branch of the renowned Gogung, offering bibimbap made with rice cooked in cow-bone broth, locally-grown bean sprouts, and homemade gochujang. More affordable than the main branch with consistent quality.
description.ko: 유명 고궁의 한옥마을점. 사골육수밥에 전주산 콩나물, 수제 고추장으로 만든 비빔밥. 본점보다 저렴하면서 변함없는 품질.

tips: Rice is cooked in cow-bone broth — richer flavor
Cheaper than the main Gogung branch
Try with their homemade gochujang
